case_title: RIDWAN NUR AKBAR VS. JOYCE LEE COLON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AKBAR, RIDWAN NUR AS TO DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AKBAR, RIDWAN NUR
DECLARATION OF RIDWAN NUR AKBAR, PLAINTIFF RE AMENDING THE CLAIM AMOUNT AND CORRECTING DEFENDANT'S NAME. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AKBAR, RIDWAN NUR
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AKBAR, RIDWAN NUR AS TO DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED DEC-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHANE GRAY--AUTO DAMAGE ADJUSTER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT JOYCE LEE COLON. FILED BY DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHANE GRAY--AUTO DAMAGES ADJUSTER. COURT WAS INFORMED BY MR. GRAY THAT DEFENDANTS SON AND NEPHEW WERE INVOLVED IN AN ACCIDENT, IN WHICH THE NEPHEW DIED AND HER SON IS IN THE HOSPITAL RIGHT NOW; DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO COME TO COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKBAR, RIDWAN NUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COLON, JOYCE LEE
